description: Forgememo persistent memory tools for AI agents

first_time.note: 'forgememo start' auto-detects a missing provider and launches interactive first-time setup. The user picks a provider once in the terminal, then the daemon starts. Tell the user to restart Codex after.

daemon_not_running.note: Run after a reboot or if any MCP tool returns 'Daemon unreachable'. Then retry the MCP call.

switch_provider.description: If the user asks to switch inference provider, run `forgememo config -i` in bash. It will print a message asking the user to run the command in their terminal. Relay that message — the user picks the provider themselves from the interactive menu.
switch_provider.note: This requires a real terminal (TTY). The agent runs the command to get the relay message; the user runs it in their terminal to interact.

tools.name: get_memory_details
tools.description: Fetch full content for IDs returned by search_memories.

parameters.ids: list of IDs like d:42 or s:3

tools.name: get_memory_timeline
tools.description: Chronological context around a distilled summary.

tools.name: save_session_summary
tools.description: Write a structured session summary (daemon write path).
